entity.description:
Beauty Serum Ingredients
1. Royal Jelly Extract EX - Penetrates damaged areas inside the hair to moisturise hair.

2. PCA - Smoothens hair while improving glossiness.

3. Squalane - Softens and makes hair supple.

For best results, use Fino Premium Touch Shampoo and Conditioner daily and Fino Premium Touch Hair Mask twice - thrice a week. Follow up with Fino Premium Touch Hair Oil or Hair Oil Serum Airy Smooth.


Note:
• Avoid contact with eyes. If contact occurs, rinse eyes immediately with cold or lukewarm water.
• Do not let water enter the container when using.
• Please close the cap after use.
• If any irritation occurs, stop use and consult a doctor.
• Keep out of reach of children. Not to be used for children under three years old.

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
Care for your hair like your skin.
Daily use conditioner formulated with 3 skincare inspired beauty serum ingredients, common with Japan's number 1 Fino Premium Touch Hair Mask*. The silky conditioner delivers beauty serum ingredients to elevate hair texture for silky smooth hair you can't stop touching.

Suitable for dry, damaged and frizzy hair caused by UV rays, chemical treatments such as colouring, perming or straightening and hot styling tools like hair dryer and iron.

*Intage SRI+ Rinse-off Treatment Market Share in Value, SKU rankings from Feb.2017 to Jan.2024

metaData.Ingredients: Water (Aqua), Sorbitol, Dimethicone, Lsopentyldiol, Behenyl Alcohol, Behentrimonium Chloride, Stearyl Alcohol, Aminopropyl Dimethi, One Hydroxypropyl, Arginine Lauryl/Myristyl Ether Hcl, Squalane, Steartrimonium Chloride, Glutamic Acid, Trehalose, Peg-90M, Pca, Phytosteryl / Octyldodecyl Lauroyl Glutamate, Royal Jelly Extract, Lactic Acid, Hydrolyzed Conchiolin Protein･Isopropyl Alcohol･Cetyl Alcohol, Alcohol, Octyldodecanl, Salicylic Acid, Disodium Edta, Butylene Glycol, Amodimethicone, Ppg-2-Deceth-12, Silica･Glycerin･Bht, Tocopherol, Phenoxyethanol, Sodium Benzoate, Fragrance (Parfum), Yellow 6 (Ci 15985)･
metaData.Key Information:
The perfect hair mask for dry, damaged, and tangled hair caused by UV rays, chemical treatments such as colouring, perming or straightening and hot styling tools like hair dryer and iron.

Powered by 6 beauty serum ingredients to moisturise and smoothen hair.
• Royal Jelly Extract EX - Richly moisturising effect
• Trehalose + Sorbitol - For more manageable hair
• PCA - Smoothens hair cuticles for smooth and shiny hair
• Phytosteryl Derivative - Repairs and strengthen hair
• 2x Squalane + Pearl Peptide - For shiny & supple hair
• Glutamic Acid - Helps maintain hair colour

Rich, jelly like consistency formula to spread evenly on hair
+401% moisture and +515% smoothness after 1 use**

**In-house test data. Results of equipment evaluation of a single use of hair mask product on damaged hair under experimental conditions; actual effects may vary by individual.
metaData.Preparation:
Directions
• After shampoo, lightly remove excess water from hair and apply an adequate amount throughout hair. Leave on hair for 5-10 minutes and rinse thoroughly.
• For best results, use at least once or twice a week.
metaData.SAP Product Name: FINO PREMIUM TOUCH HAIR MASK REFILL PACK 700G
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool, dry place. Do not leave product in direct sunlight or exposed to high temperature

metaData.Key Information:
• Lightweight and nourishing daily out bath hair oil.
• Instant smoothening finish.
• Non-sticky & non-greasy finishing.
• Powered by beauty ingredients and skincare technology to moisturise and care for hair.
• Powered by 2x Squalane + Pearl Peptide.
• Damage Barrier Function against friction and heat (up to 230 degree celcius) to prevent further damage.
metaData.Preparation:
DIRECTIONS
For a Soft & Voluminous Finish:
After towel-drying or half-dry hair, apply an adequate amount (1-2 full pumps) on your palm, spread it over both hands, and apply it all over your hair, especially on the ends. Comb your hair though with your fingers or with a brush.

For a Silky Smooth Finish:
On dry hair, apply on areas where you want to add shine or smoothen

product.name: Fino Premium Touch Hair Mask

offers.description: Buy 1 Fino Premium Touch Hair Mask @ $4.40

parentCategory.name: Beauty & Personal Care
parentCategory.tagLine: Bath & body, hair care, facial wash & more

product.description:
• Moist & Rich Complex - Infused with Hyaluronic Acid and Soybean extract to deliver an instant moisture boost in 1 use*, leaving hair soft and hydrated.

• Camellia Oil Force - Powered by Tsubaki’s signature ingredient to deeply moisturise, repair damage, reduce frizz and breakage, and hydrate the scalp for healthier hair and scalp.

• Damage-Sensor Technology - Detects and attaches to damaged areas of the hair to deliver repairing effect.

Transform your hair with this innovative Japanese formula for beautifully moisturised, silky hair. No waiting required—see and feel the difference after just one wash!

• Suitable for:
- Dry & Frizzy Hair
- Damaged hair caused by chemical treatments, heat and styling

Note:
• Avoid contact with eyes. If contact occurs, rinse eyes immediately with cold or lukewarm water.
• After use, please close the cap.
• Not to be used for children under three years of age.

metaData.Ingredients: Water (Aqua), Stearyl Alcohol, Isopentyldiol, Behentrimonium Chloride, Glycerin, Dimethicone, Aminopropyl Dimethicone, Polysilicon-13. Steartrimonium Chloride, Squalane, Camellia Japonica Seed Oil, Sodium Dilauramidoglutamide Lysine, Phytosteryl/Octyldodecyl Lauroyl Glutamate, Phytosteryl Macadamiate, Glycine Soja (Soybean) Seed Extract, Bis-Ethylhexyloxyphenol Methoxyphenyl Triazine, Actic Acid, Sodium Acetylated Hyaluronate, Cetyl Alcohol, Isopropyl Alcohol, Dipropylene Glycol, Isopropyl Myristate, Peg-2 Laurate, Sodium Methyltaurate, Salicylic Acid, C13-16 Isoparaffin, Laurtrimonium Chloride, C10-13 Isoparaffin, Disodium Edta, Cetrimonium Chloride, Butylene Glycol, Amodimethicone, Ppg-2-Deceth-12, Tocopherol, Sodium Benzoate, Phenoxyethanol, Fragrance (Parfum)
metaData.Key Information:
• 72 hrs moisture retention* - instant hydration & improves frizzy hair
• Get moisturised hair in just 1 use* and achieve salon-quality hair at home with zero waiting time!

*Based on consumer test , 34 respondents (Moist SP), 32 respondents (Moist CD), 32 respondents (Moist TM), China, Feb-Mar 2024.
metaData.Preparation:
• Hold cap and turn nozzle in to unlock the pump, push pump a few times until conditioner is dispensed.
• After shampooing, apply an adequate amount to hair and rinse thoroughly with water.
• No waiting time needed!
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool, dry place. Do not leave product in direct sunlight or exposed to high temperature

product.description:
• Locks in the moisture and somoothen the strays
• Reduces dryness and brittlenesss
• Reduces frizz & strengthen hair
• Enchances shine

metaData.Ingredients: Hyaluronic Acid + B5, Sodium Hyaluronate (Ha), Panthenol (Vitamin B5)
metaData.Key Information:
• We’re not going to lie: a good quality conditioner makes all the difference in combating dry and frizzy hair.
• That’s why this formula delivers Hyaluronic Acid to retain moisture by pulling in water from the atmosphere, thus reducing dryness and brittleness.
• Vitamin B5 penetrates your hair shaft to plump it up and seal in the moisture.
• For best effect, pair this with SilkPro Soft & Smooth Shampoo and give your strands a coat of smooth-silky shine.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in cool and dry place

product.name: Silkpro Premium Treatment Conditioner

parentCategory.name: Beauty & Personal Care
parentCategory.tagLine: Bath & body, hair care, facial wash & more

product.description:
• Volume & Rich Complex - Nourish and revitalise hair to help enhance hair volume without any sticky sensation*
90% agree hair feels volumised all day long*

• Camellia Oil Force - Powered by Tsubaki’s signature ingredient to deeply moisturise, repair damage, reduce frizz and breakage, and hydrate the scalp for healthier hair and scalp.

• Damage-Sensor Technology - Detects and attaches to damaged areas of the hair to deliver repairing effect.

Transform flat, lifeless hair into full, thick, and bouncy strands instantly. Specially formulated to lift and add volume from the roots, for volumised, shiny hair with bounce. No waiting required—see and feel the difference after just one wash!

• Suitable for:
- Fine, Flat & Limp Hair
- Damaged hair caused by chemical treatments, heat and styling

Note:
• Avoid contact with eyes. If contact occurs, rinse eyes immediately with cold or lukewarm water.
• After use, please close the cap.
• Not to be used for children under three years of age.

metaData.Key Information:
REPAIRS SEVERELY DAMAGED HAIR* IN ONE USE**
KEEP HAIR SOFT FOR 7 DAYS STRAIGHT^ AND ACHIEVE SALON-QUALITY HAIR AT HOME WITH ZERO WAITING TIME!

1) IONIC-EX REPAIRING INGREDIENT
Reach into damaged hair to deliver repairing effect to achieve smooth, shiny, and moisturised hair. For visibly stronger and healthier hair.

2) DAMAGE-SENSOR TECHNOLOGY
Detects and attaches to damaged areas of the hair to deliver repairing effect.

3) CAMELLIA OIL
Contains 2X the Golden Repair Ingredients^^ (Camellia Seed Oil, Royal Jelly Extract) to repair and strengthen damaged hair and give it a natural shine.

4) SEAL-IN REPAIR FUNCTION
Mask formula helps protect entire hair shaft while beauty ingredients reaches inside damaged hair to achieve soft, shiny hair.

Suitable for:
• All hair types including dry, damaged weakened hair prone to breakage
• Severely damaged hair caused by chemical treatments, heat and styling
• Split ends

*Coloured and permed hair
**Based on instrumental evaluation of hair tress, 2023. Actual results may vary from person to person
^Based on clinical test, 22 female subjects, aged 20-59, Korea, Nov 2023
^^As compared to Tsubaki Premium EX Damage Care & Repair Conditioner.
metaData.Preparation:
After shampoo and conditioner, lightly remove excess water from hair and apply an adequate amount throughout the hair. Rinse thoroughly. (No waiting time needed as sufficient benefits will be delivered even if hair is rinsed right away.)
The product has a strong treatment effect. It is best to use it at least once or twice a week.
For best results, use together with TSUBAKI shampoo and conditioner.
